query:
SELECT s.id, s.buyerName, p.address as propertyAddress, p.propertyReference, s.saleDate, s.expectedPaymentDate, s.totalCommission, s.commissionPaymentDate, s.createdAt 
FROM sales s
LEFT JOIN properties p ON s.propertyId = p.id
WHERE s.saleDate >= '2025-01-01' AND s.saleDate < '2025-02-01'
ORDER BY s.saleDate DESC
LIMIT 20;
